BlogPost.title: BlogPost
BlogPost.description: A saved blog post with metadata and generated content.

userId.description: The UID of the user who saved the post.

userEmail.description: The email of the user who saved the post.

topic.description: The original topic/prompt for the post.

title.description: The generated title of the blog post.

blogPostHtml.description: The full HTML content of the blog post.

altText.description: Alt text for the featured image.

thumbnailDataUrl.description: Data URL for the generated thumbnail.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was saved.
